trans-unit.resname: At least one language must be used.
trans-unit.source: At least one language must be used.
trans-unit.target: At least one language must be used.

trans-unit.resname: Describe how you addressed the requested changes before resubmitting.
trans-unit.source: Describe how you addressed the requested changes before resubmitting.
trans-unit.target: Describe how you addressed the requested changes before resubmitting.

trans-unit.resname: Enter a 6-digit authenticator code or a 16-character lowercase-hex backup code.
trans-unit.source: Enter a 6-digit authenticator code or a 16-character lowercase-hex backup code.
trans-unit.target: Enter a 6-digit authenticator code or a 16-character lowercase-hex backup code.

trans-unit.resname: Enter a closing date and time.
trans-unit.source: Enter a closing date and time.
trans-unit.target: Enter a closing date and time.

trans-unit.resname: Enter a start date and time.
trans-unit.source: Enter a start date and time.
trans-unit.target: Enter a start date and time.

trans-unit.resname: Enter a valid URL (starting with http:// or https://).
trans-unit.source: Enter a valid URL (starting with http:// or https://).
trans-unit.target: Enter a valid URL (starting with http:// or https://).

trans-unit.resname: Enter an end date and time.
trans-unit.source: Enter an end date and time.
trans-unit.target: Enter an end date and time.

trans-unit.resname: Enter an opening date and time.
trans-unit.source: Enter an opening date and time.
trans-unit.target: Enter an opening date and time.

trans-unit.source: Error
trans-unit.target: Error

trans-unit.resname: Feedback is required when requesting changes or rejecting.
trans-unit.source: Feedback is required when requesting changes or rejecting.
trans-unit.target: Feedback is required when requesting changes or rejecting.

trans-unit.resname: Fill in the Dutch text.
trans-unit.source: Fill in the Dutch text.
trans-unit.target: Fill in the Dutch text.

trans-unit.resname: Fill in the English text.
trans-unit.source: Fill in the English text.
trans-unit.target: Fill in the English text.

trans-unit.resname: Please enter a password.
trans-unit.source: Please enter a password.
trans-unit.target: Please enter a password.

trans-unit.resname: Please enter your current password.
trans-unit.source: Please enter your current password.
trans-unit.target: Please enter your current password.

trans-unit.resname: Please enter your password.
trans-unit.source: Please enter your password.
trans-unit.target: Please enter your password.

trans-unit.resname: Please enter your verification code.
trans-unit.source: Please enter your verification code.
trans-unit.target: Please enter your verification code.

trans-unit.resname: The activity must start in the future.
trans-unit.source: The activity must start in the future.
trans-unit.target: The activity must start in the future.

trans-unit.resname: The end time must be after the start time.
trans-unit.source: The end time must be after the start time.
trans-unit.target: The end time must be after the start time.

trans-unit.resname: The sign-up list must close before the activity starts.
trans-unit.source: The sign-up list must close before the activity starts.
trans-unit.target: The sign-up list must close before the activity starts.

trans-unit.resname: The sign-up list must open before it closes.
trans-unit.source: The sign-up list must open before it closes.
trans-unit.target: The sign-up list must open before it closes.

trans-unit.resname: The sign-up list must open in the future.
trans-unit.source: The sign-up list must open in the future.
trans-unit.target: The sign-up list must open in the future.

trans-unit.resname: Your password should be at least {{ limit }} characters.
trans-unit.source: Your password should be at least {{ limit }} characters.
trans-unit.target: Your password should be at least {{ limit }} characters.

trans-unit.resname: Your password should be at most {{ limit }} characters.
trans-unit.source: Your password should be at most {{ limit }} characters.
trans-unit.target: Your password should be at most {{ limit }} characters.
